description: Update the 'FchPat_NumSS' field in the 'fchpat' table of the MedinTux 'DrTuxTest' database using corrected Social Security Numbers (NIR) from '~/Documents/cpam_corrections.csv'. Match patients based on Last Name, First Name, and Date of Birth. For any patient in the CSV not found in the database, append their details to '~/Documents/missing_patients_log.txt'. Ensure patients not listed in the CSV remain unmodified.
